chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO 1st Criminal Bail No. S-348 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.3199/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection “A”. 3. For order on M.A No.3200/2025 (E/A). 4. For hearing of Bail Application. 30.06.2025 Mr. Farooq Ahmed Gaad, Advocate a/w Applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through instant application U/S 498/498-A Cr.P.C, applicant Imran alias Imran Ali seeks protective bail in Crime No.218/2025 of Police Station Kamber City under Sections 452, 366-A, 34, P.P.C and 3 of TIP Act, 2018. It is contended by learned counsel that the Applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated by the complainant; that there is delay of 8 days in lodgment of F.I.R. without any plausible explanation; that the applicant is law abiding citizen and intends to appear before the learned Trial Court but feels apprehension of his arrest at the hands of police. By contending so he seeks protective bail for the applicant so that he may be able to surrender himself before trial Court for pre-arrest bail. In view of above, present applicant is granted protective bail for a period of seven days subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousands only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of period of seven days from today i.e. on 06.07.2025 or on the date when the applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court whichever is earlier.

In view of above, present applicant is granted protective bail for a period of seven days subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousands only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of period of seven days from today i.e. on 06.07.2025 or on the date when the applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court whichever is earlier. The operation of the N.B.Ws, if any shall remain suspended till such period. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Manzoor
